---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["feature", "needs-review"]
---

## 🎯 Description
A clear and concise description of what feature you'd like to be added.

## 💡 Motivation
Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## 📋 Use Case
Describe the use case and how this feature would benefit CampusOS.

### Example Scenario
Walk through a real-world example of how this would be used.

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
If you have an idea for implementation, describe it here.

## 🤔 Alternatives
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📚 Additional Context
- Related issues or discussions
- Design mockups or diagrams (if applicable)
- Reference links to similar features in other projects

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
